results.title: Add OAuth 2.0 authorization flow with PKCE support
results.snippet: Add OAuth 2.0 authorization flow with PKCE support
The authentication middleware now supports both session cookies and Bearer JWT tokens. Session cookies have a 7-day TTL with 24h inactivity timeout.

results.title: Auth Architecture
results.snippet: Two-layer auth: session cookies for the dashboard, Bearer JWT for the MCP endpoint. Localhost bypass for worker access. PKCE S256 support for OAuth clients.

results.title: Fix refresh token rotation bug causing double-invalidation
results.snippet: Fix refresh token rotation bug causing double-invalidation

results.title: Auth spec
results.snippet: OAuth clients use RS256 JWTs with 1-hour access token lifetime. Refresh tokens rotate on use with 30-day TTL.
